ddls:
CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., detail-report, format_commas) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target URL or resource for the link */,
  "placement" TEXT /* Placement of the link on the web page */,
  "options" TEXT /* Additional options for the link (e.g., formatting options) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the link is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the link */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link's purpose or context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_placement FOREIGN KEY ("placement") REFERENCES link_placements ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_options FOREIGN KEY ("options") REFERENCES link_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES link_targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_link_type FOREIGN KEY ("link_type") REFERENCES link_types ("link_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_types" (
  "link_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the link type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the link type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the link type */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the link type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement */,
  "placement_name" TEXT /* Name of the placement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the placement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the placement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the placement was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the placement is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the placement */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the option is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the target is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the target */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the link being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the link */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., view, click) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage was recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the usage record is active */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session during the usage */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the link was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_usages_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES links ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_usages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., webmaster, content creator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
